nasb.text: “Before I formed you in the womb I knew you, And before you were born I consecrated you; I have appointed you a prophet to the nations.”

esv.text: “Before I formed you in the womb I knew you, and before you were born I consecrated you; I appointed you a prophet to the nations.”

cnv.text: “我使你在母腹中成形以先，就認識你； 你還未出母胎，我已把你分別為聖， 立你作列國的先知。”

ccb.text: “我还没有使你在母腹中成形，就认识你； 你还未出生，我已使你圣洁， 立你做万国的先知。”
